name: legal-toolkit
description: In-house legal toolkit for 台灣 SME → 上市櫃 法務 — 7-layer schema-driven contract review (Stark / Adams / Burnham + Taiwan overlay: 強行/任意 規定二分 / 定型化契約 §247-1 / 六準則解釋), playbook-driven negotiation (visible per-clause Markdown + variant-folder schema, ABAC pre-filter, walk-away / fallback / preferred 三層 escalation), and disclaimer-driven outputs (Mandatory Disclaimer + Escalation Override on high-risk findings). 3 skills: using-legal-toolkit (router) + legal-playbook-author (bootstrap/extend/revise) + legal-contract-review (review/redline/nda mode). v0.2.0 (Phase 1.5) expanded bundled fallback from 4 to 8 clauses (variant-folder limitation-of-liability / indemnification / data-protection-dpa keyed by deal_size or jurisdiction + flat ip-assignment-and-license) and added Python scripts (discover_playbook / validate_schema / detect_conflicts / abac_filter / build_baseline / seed_baseline) plus JSON Schema 2020-12 frontmatter validation. v0.3.0 (Phase 1.6) adds the eval-tier rubric (20-criterion answer + 10-criterion source + 12-criterion playbook-quality, each tagged deterministic vs semantic) and self_grade.py that runs the 22 deterministic checks against contract-review output (writes self-grade.md), plus a calibration procedure for hand-grading 5-10 contracts against Pearson targets ≥ 0.6 / ≥ 0.7. v0.3.1 dogfood-driven patches: L7 Step 1.5 stance-asymmetry pass; L6 sub-check 4 vagueness scan; L7 Step 9.3 citation applicability gate; SRC-04 + statute-articles.json blacklist closes SRC-09 escape via fabricated sub-articles + deprecated §27; banner placement narrowed; NDA mode dispatch aligned; findings.json schema documented. v0.3.2 second-pass dogfood patches: L7 Step 0 asset identification pass (favorable existing clauses surface as favorable_position_notes instead of being invisible); L6 Step 2.5 dedup pass (missing-items + vagueness gaps merge into parent L7 finding when overlapping); L7 Step 9.3.0 soft case-citation rule (forbids case-number patterns unless WebFetch-verified in session OR listed in assets/statute-articles.json#cases_verified); 7 fabricated judicial case citations REMOVED from bundled fallback baselines (replaced with statute + 王澤鑑 / 王文宇 commentary doctrine pointers). v0.3.3 Phase 1.7 bundled-vs-runtime architecture refactor: cache-then-fetch-then-LLM workflow for all statute / case / function-letter citations; assets/legal-sources.json (12 statutes + judgment.judicial.gov.tw direct-data + 7 主管機關 search URLs); scripts/cache_check.py + scripts/build_citation_url.py with 43 new tests; L7 Step 9.3.1/9.3.2/9.3.3 protocol additions; .legal-toolkit/cache/ TTL-based cache (30d statute / 7d case / 30d function letter); offline-graceful with runtime_verified=false marker (NO silent LLM training-data substitution); fetch budget cap (default 10 unique citations / run, configurable via config.example.yml); citations[].runtime_verified + cache_path + amendment_note fields; top-level runtime_fetch_summary telemetry. v0.3.4 Phase 1.8 output consolidation: 7 output files reduced to 3 — legal.md (lawyer/GC/ops audience, absorbs former issues + escalation + memo-legal + redline + favorable + self-grade-summary), business.md (non-lawyer audience), findings.json (canonical SoT + new self_grade block absorbing former self-grade.md); banner placement narrowed to legal.md only (business.md never carries banner). v0.3.5 Phase 1.9 audit-driven polish + NDA fallback: (P0a) legal.md §QA back-fill via <!-- self_grade:start/end --> markers closes v0.3.4 stale-render bug; (P0b) business.md §主要 Redline 重點 light-touch reformat (Why + 修正方向 + Timing + cross-ref to legal.md, NOT full clause body — non-lawyer overload caught by audit); (P0c) [!danger] vs [!warning] signal split (placeholder warnings no longer dilute high-risk callout); (C) 3 NDA-native fallback baselines added (deemed-breach-cascade / disclosing-party-indemnity / assignment-prohibition) closing §2.2/§2.3/§5.1/§11 gaps caught across 3 audit rounds; 4 → 7 runtime cold-start baselines (tarball regen deferred to v0.3.6); 171 tests pass. English skill instructions + zh-TW domain content + bilingual triggers. v0.3.6 Phase 1.10 cross-skill plumbing refactor: legal-sources.json promoted to plugin-level scripts/canonical/ SoT (mirror of translation-toolkit pattern); scripts/distribute.py deploys byte-identical functional copies to each consuming skill's assets/; scripts/verify-drift.py CI gate fails PRs on any drift. Unblocks Phase 2 (legal-document-draft + legal-incident-response) sibling-skill access without violating self-contained-skill convention. v0.4.0 Phase 2 ships legal-document-draft (4 modes — privacy / ToS / DPA / NDA): skeleton-and-LLM-fill templates pinned to current in-force Taiwan law (Path A from SP2 verify run); 2-file audience-shaped output (<doc-type>.md publish-ready + compliance.md 法務 review); hand-curated per-mode compliance checklists with statute citations (個資法 §8 八款 / §9 / §21 / §27 / 民法 §12-13/§227/§247-1/§250 / 消保法 §11-1/§17/§19 / 公平交易法); deterministic structural grading (no orphan {{vars}} / verdict coverage / canonical TBD ids / truncation guard); legal-playbook/profile.yml as shared company identity SoT; 委託/受託 model (NOT GDPR controller-processor); safe defaults for items deferred to PDPC 子法 (Phase 2.5 migration template documented). Cross-skill: shares legal-playbook/confidentiality.md stance with legal-contract-review nda mode; references legal-sources.json URL templates at template authoring time (NOT runtime fetch). Phase 2-5 adds document-draft / incident-response / issue-spot / research / contract-tracker / regulation-watch / corporate-governance / dd-quickscan — see ROADMAP.md. v0.4.1 SP3a dogfood patches: P0 fix template-privacy.md 民法 §12 成年年齡 (template 殘存 pre-2020-amendment 「未滿二十歲」 — corrected to 「未滿十八歲」 per 2023-01-01 民法 修正; statute-citations.md amended in lockstep); P1 add Path A anti-pattern grep to grade_draft.py (rejects 「未滿二十歲」 / 「72 小時」 / 「controller-processor」 / 「資料控管者」 in published <doc-type>.md output — catches future research-to-template author drift before grader passes; compliance.md still allowed to cite anti-patterns in 「NOT X」 explanatory form); P1 move template-nda.md authoring note 「典型範圍 3-7 年；技術機密可延至 10 年或永久」 into HTML comment (no longer leaks into delivered counterparty NDA) + drop undocumented {{survival_years_explanation}} variable; P1 restructure template-privacy.md §3 特種個資 awkward parenthetical into clean heading + paragraph form (avoids 「如蒐集 §6 特種個資 (不主動蒐集 §6 特種個資…)」 self-contradicting rendered output); 201 tests pass (was 194 + 7 new parameterized anti-pattern tests). Self-dogfood audit at docs/superpowers/audits/2026-05-13-legal-document-draft-sp3a-dogfood.md. v0.4.2 Phase 2 closeout ships legal-incident-response (3-path classifier — 個資外洩 / 主管機關函覆 / 合約違約): auto-classify + confirm path routing; audience-shaped 2-file output (legal.md + business.md) with optional handoff-context.json for contract-breach delegation; ISO 8601 timeline section with ⏳ markers for未發 anchors; mixed per-path authoring (PII skeleton+LLM / Authority pure-LLM / Contract-breach delegate); single grade_response.py per-path branch sharing Path A anti-pattern bank with v0.4.1 SP3a; profile.yml schema v1 → v2 (+2 optional fields external_counsel + regulatory_authorities; backward-compat v1 profiles); legal-toolkit/scripts/canonical/ SSOT extends to cover pdpa-current-state.md + tbd-migration-template.md + profile-schema.yml + load_profile.py (distributed to both legal-document-draft + legal-incident-response functional copies via distribute.py); router Q3 dispatch activated; contract-breach 違約 path delegates to legal-contract-review via handoff-context.json (soft delegation; user manually invokes; --seed flag consumption deferred to v0.4.3); zh-TW only (multi-language via translation-toolkit). Closes Phase 2 of legal-toolkit ROADMAP (累計 5 skills active: router + playbook-author + contract-review + document-draft + incident-response). Phase 3 IRAC cluster (legal-issue-spot + legal-research) is next. / v0.4.3: profile-schema v2 (dpo.phone) + SP3b dogfood patches / v0.4.4: P2 polish bundle (checklist reframe + grader template-orphan check) + v0.4.x line paused. v0.5.0 Phase 3 SP3-a ships legal-issue-spot (🔍 IRAC cluster, sub-skill 1 of 2): pure-LLM IRAC issue-spotting from business-language fact patterns (「我們想做 X，能不能做？」 → issue 矩陣 + per-element 構成要件 涵攝 + reverse-side counterfactual + 🔴/🟡/🟢 risk grade + escalation 建議); 2-file audience-shaped output (issues.md for 法務 / business.md for 業務 + escalation 建議); no external fetches / no profile.yml dependency / no playbook coupling (orthogonal to contract-review); soft handoff to /legal-research via business.md when ⚠️ low-confidence subsumption detected (concrete query string emitted); 6-protocol pipeline (parse-facts → timeline → spot-issues → subsumption → counterfactual → risk-grade); references covering 民法 請求權基礎 / 勞動 構成要件 / 個資 構成要件; deterministic structural grader (grade_issue_spot.py: 10 checks — 7-section issues.md + 6-section business.md presence + subsumption table validity + Path A anti-pattern bank + template-orphan check + risk-grade emoji + §建議下一步 handoff-when-⚠️ + §6.3 Disclaimer footer + 🔴/≥2⚠️ Escalation Override); Path A discipline shared with v0.4.x (current Taiwan in-force law; 民法 §12 18-year-old; 委託/受託 not controller-processor). Plugin grows to 6 active skills: router + playbook-author + contract-review + document-draft + incident-response + issue-spot. Phase 3 SP3-b (legal-research; v0.5.2 planned) adds the second IRAC sub-skill with iterative-search + 三角驗證 + document-level citation enforcement. v0.5.2 Phase 3 SP3-b ships legal-research (🔍 IRAC cluster, sub-skill 2 of 2 — full IRAC cluster now active): legal-citation research with Agent abstraction (plan-adapt-interact 半互動 — plan-first then Y/n confirm before autonomous loop); WebFetch-only (no Python scrapers; fallback chain = primary source URL → Google cache → archive.org Wayback); 4-protocol pipeline (plan → iterative-search → triangulate → cite); loop cap ≤ 5 rounds OR ≤ 30 fetches; early-stop when ≥ 8 sources AND ≥ 2 法源類型 reached; forced_stop emits ⚠️ marker in output for user visibility; 4-file output (plan.md research plan / state.json execution telemetry / research-memo.md 法務 audience / executive-summary.md 業務 audience); Harvey-style doc-level citation manifest with 3-line shape per source (URL + title + access date); §6.4 Escalation Override triggers extend to forced_stop / 刑事 / 訴訟 / 跨境 / 重大金額; deterministic structural grader (grade_research.py: 15 checks — 4-section research-memo.md + 3-section executive-summary.md presence + plan.md gates + state.json invariants + citation manifest 3-line shape + Path A anti-pattern bank + template-orphan check + risk emoji + §建議下一步 + §6.3 Mandatory Disclaimer footer + Escalation Override on extended triggers); drift verify activates 4-grader bank byte-identical check (PATH_A_ANTIPATTERNS + _check_no_template_orphans helper now enforced across grade_draft / grade_response / grade_issue_spot / grade_research, was forward-stub in v0.5.0). Plugin grows to 7 active skills (full IRAC cluster active): router + playbook-author + contract-review + document-draft + incident-response + issue-spot + research. Phase 3 fully closed; Phase 4 Tracker cluster (v0.6.0) is next.
